tasks.title: Fix Custom Tool Discovery Format
tasks.description: Custom tool discovery scans TOOL.md instead of .ts/.js. Modify DirectoryScanner::scan_tools() in crates/core/src/config/directory_scanner.rs:228 to change file extension filter from TOOL.md to .ts and .js. Parse JavaScript/TypeScript tool definitions with export default tool({...}) pattern. Extract tool name, description, and argument schema from parsed files. Verify discovery works for both project-level (.opencode/tools/) and global-level (~/.config/opencode/tools/).
test_criteria: Custom tools in .opencode/tools/*.ts are discovered
Custom tools in .opencode/tools/*.js are discovered
Tool definitions are parsed correctly (name, description, args schema)
Both project-level and global-level discovery work
tasks.impl_notes: Parse TypeScript/JavaScript using swc or similar. Support export default tool({name, description, args}) pattern.

tasks.title: Register Custom Tools with ToolRegistry
tasks.description: Discovered tools recorded in config but NOT registered with ToolRegistry. Create registration flow from DirectoryScanner to ToolRegistry. Ensure discovered custom tools appear in tool listing. Verify custom tools can be executed through standard tool pipeline. Add integration test for custom tool discovery → registration → execution.
test_criteria: Discovered custom tools appear in ToolRegistry listing
Custom tools can be executed with proper permission gating
Integration test passes for discovery → registration → execution
tasks.impl_notes: Fixed ToolDiscovery name parsing to use 'name' property instead of JavaScript variable name. Added integration tests for custom tool discovery, registration, and execution. The register_custom_tools() function exists in opencode_tools::discovery and can be called during initialization.

tasks.title: Implement Plugin Tool Registration
tasks.description: PluginToolAdapter exists but no mechanism to register plugin tools. Add register_tool() method to Plugin trait in crates/plugin/src/lib.rs. Implement tool registration in PluginManager. Integrate PluginManager with ToolRegistry for plugin-provided tools. Add tests verifying plugin tools appear in registry after plugin activation. Verify plugin tools respect permission system.
test_criteria: Plugins can add tools to agent toolset via register_tool()
Plugin tools appear in ToolRegistry after plugin activation
Plugin tools are subject to same permission gating as built-in tools
tasks.impl_notes: Plugin trait needs register_tool(self, tool: Tool) method. PluginManager handles storage and ToolRegistry integration.

tasks.title: Fix Hook Execution Determinism
tasks.description: Hooks execute in HashMap iteration order (non-deterministic). Add explicit priority field to plugin/hook configuration. Replace HashMap iteration with ordered iteration using priority. Document execution order guarantees in code. Add test verifying deterministic execution order across multiple runs.
test_criteria: Hooks execute in consistent, predictable order
Test confirms same plugin order produces same hook execution order
Execution order is documented
tasks.impl_notes: Use BTreeMap or Vec with priority sorting instead of HashMap for hook storage.

tasks.title: Enforce Plugin Config Ownership
tasks.description: Server/runtime and TUI plugin configs can be mixed. Add validation in config loading to separate plugin configs. Ensure opencode.json plugins stay in server/runtime domain. Ensure tui.json plugins stay in TUI domain. Add warning/error when configs are incorrectly mixed.
test_criteria: Plugin config ownership boundary is enforced
Mixed configs produce warning or error
opencode.json plugins only load in server/runtime context
tui.json plugins only load in TUI context
tasks.impl_notes: Add domain field to plugin config. Validate domain matches loading context.

tasks.title: Test Primary Agent Invariant
tasks.description: No test verifying exactly-one-active-primary-agent. Add unit test in crates/agent/ verifying single active primary agent. Test that creating new primary agent deactivates previous. Test that hidden agents (compaction, title, summary) don't affect invariant. Add integration test for session with multiple agent switches.
test_criteria: Test confirms exactly one active primary agent per session
Test verifies invariant maintained across agent switches
Hidden agents (compaction, title, summary) don't affect invariant
tasks.impl_notes: Added unit tests in crates/agent/src/runtime.rs for primary agent invariant. Tests verify: hidden agents (CompactionAgent, TitleAgent, SummaryAgent) return is_visible()=false and don't affect invariant; hidden subagent execution preserves primary agent state; switching between visible agents maintains invariant. Created integration tests in tests/src/agent_switch_tests.rs covering multiple agent switches, deactivation/reactivation, and session preservation.

tasks.title: Test Ownership Tree Acyclicity
tasks.description: No unit tests for Project→Session→Message→Part ownership tree. Add unit test in crates/core/ verifying ownership tree is acyclic. Test that cycles cannot be created (Project→Session→Message→Part→Project). Add integration test for fork chain maintaining acyclicity.
test_criteria: Ownership tree acyclicity is verified by tests
Fork operations maintain tree structure correctly
Cannot create cycles in ownership tree
tasks.impl_notes: Added 16 unit tests in crates/core/src/session.rs verifying ownership tree acyclicity. Tests include: depth-first traversal cycle detection (build_session_graph, detect_cycle_in_graph), ownership tree acyclicity tests (simple session, simple fork chain, multi-level fork chain, many forks, no self-reference, direct parent no cycle, indirect cycle detection), and fork acyclicity tests (simple, multi-generation, after serialization, lineage path integrity, multiple children from same parent, fork_at_message preserves chain, deep chain verify no back reference, compute_lineage_path never self-references).

tasks.title: Complete Session Lifecycle Integration Tests
tasks.description: Missing create→fork→share→compact→revert integration test. Add integration test covering complete session lifecycle: Create session, Fork child session, Share session (export/share mechanism), Compact session (context compression), Revert to checkpoint. Verify session state integrity after each operation. Verify message history preserved correctly through operations.
test_criteria: Complete lifecycle test passes
Session state consistent after each operation
Message history preserved correctly through all operations
tasks.impl_notes: Created session_lifecycle_tests.rs with 6 integration tests: test_session_lifecycle_create_fork_share_compact_revert (full lifecycle), test_session_lifecycle_fork_preserves_message_history (fork with lineage), test_session_lifecycle_share_preserves_across_operations (share across fork/compact), test_session_lifecycle_compact_preserves_recent_messages (compaction behavior), test_session_lifecycle_revert_with_checkpoints (revert and checkpoint integration), test_session_lifecycle_full_integration_sequence (all operations in sequence). All tests pass with cargo test -p opencode-integration-tests -- session_lifecycle.

tasks.title: Implement Desktop App
tasks.description: Desktop app not implemented (stubs only). Implement desktop startup flow in crates/cli/. Integrate WebView for desktop shell. Implement desktop-specific configuration handling. Add desktop mode to CLI argument parsing.
test_criteria: Desktop app starts successfully
WebView displays TUI content
Desktop mode CLI flag works
tasks.impl_notes: Use raw-window-handle and webview2-rs for cross-platform WebView. Desktop mode starts both TUI and web server.

tasks.title: Implement Web Server Mode
tasks.description: Web server mode incomplete (stub only). Implement full web server in crates/cli/src/cmd/web.rs. Add authentication protection to web endpoints. Implement session sharing between web and TUI modes. Add web-specific route handlers.
test_criteria: Web server serves authenticated endpoints
Sessions accessible from both web and TUI interfaces
Authentication protects all web endpoints
tasks.impl_notes: Use actix-web for HTTP server. Implement token-based authentication. Share session state between TUI and web contexts.

tasks.title: Implement ACP Transport
tasks.description: ACP transport not implemented (event structs exist). Implement ACP handshake mechanism. Implement ACP transport layer for editor communication. Add connection management for ACP clients. Integrate with server for ACP endpoint handling.
test_criteria: ACP handshake completes successfully
Editor integration works via ACP transport
ACP client connection management works
tasks.impl_notes: Implement ACP protocol over WebSocket. Handle client registration and message routing.

tasks.title: Refactor Config Crate
tasks.description: crates/config/src/lib.rs is empty re-export. Move config logic from crates/core/src/config.rs to crates/config/. Ensure crates/config/ contains actual config implementation. Update imports in dependent crates. Verify config precedence and ownership still works.
test_criteria: Config logic resides in crates/config/ crate
All config functionality preserved after refactor
Config precedence still works correctly
Config ownership still works correctly
tasks.impl_notes: Move Config struct, loading logic, and validation from core to config crate. Update all imports.

tasks.title: TUI Slash Command Tests
tasks.description: No automated tests for slash command execution. Add tests for /compact command, /connect command, /help command, and unknown/invalid slash commands.
test_criteria: /compact command has test coverage
/connect command has test coverage
/help command has test coverage
Unknown/invalid slash commands have test coverage
tasks.impl_notes: Added 28 tests in crates/tui/tests/slash_command_tests.rs covering /compact, /connect, /help commands and unknown/invalid slash commands. Also added filtered_commands() getter method to SlashCommandOverlay.

tasks.title: TUI Input Model Tests
tasks.description: No tests for input model (multiline, history, autocomplete). Add tests for multiline input handling, input history navigation, and autocomplete triggering.
test_criteria: Multiline input handling has test coverage
Input history navigation has test coverage
Autocomplete triggering has test coverage
tasks.impl_notes: Test InputModel state transitions and event handling.

tasks.title: TUI Sidebar Tests
tasks.description: No tests for sidebar visibility and content. Add tests for sidebar visibility toggle, file tree content, MCP/LSP status display, and diagnostics display.
test_criteria: Sidebar visibility toggle has test coverage
File tree content has test coverage
MCP/LSP status display has test coverage
Diagnostics display has test coverage
tasks.impl_notes: Test Sidebar component visibility and content rendering.

tasks.title: Per-Agent Model Override Test
tasks.description: Per-agent model override not explicitly tested. Add test for agent-specific model selection. Verify build agent uses default model. Verify model override affects only specified agent.
test_criteria: Agent-specific model selection is verified
build agent uses default model
Model override affects only specified agent
tasks.impl_notes: Test that AgentConfig.model field overrides global provider model for specific agents.

tasks.title: Route-Group Presence Tests
tasks.description: No integration tests for route groups. Add tests for session route group, config route group, provider route group, permission route group, and MCP route group.
test_criteria: Session route group has tests
Config route group has tests
Provider route group has tests
Permission route group has tests
MCP route group has tests
tasks.impl_notes: Add integration tests for each route group ensuring endpoints are accessible and return expected responses.

tasks.title: API Negative Tests
tasks.description: No negative tests for unauthorized/malformed requests. Add tests for unauthorized access (missing auth token), invalid auth token, malformed request bodies, and invalid session/message IDs.
test_criteria: Unauthorized access (missing auth token) returns 401
Invalid auth token returns 401
Malformed request bodies return 400
Invalid session/message IDs return 404
tasks.impl_notes: Test API security by sending malformed/malicious requests and verifying proper error responses.

tasks.title: Hidden vs Visible Agent UI Tests
tasks.description: Hidden vs visible agent UI behavior untested. Add tests for visible agents (build, plan) in selection flows. Add tests for hidden agents (compaction, title, summary) not in selection. Verify UI displays correct agent list.
test_criteria: Visible agents (build, plan) appear in selection flows
Hidden agents (compaction, title, summary) don't appear in selection
UI displays correct agent list based on visibility
tasks.impl_notes: Test that hidden agents are filtered from UI selection but still functional.

tasks.title: Theme Auto-Sync Test
tasks.description: Theme auto-sync on install not tested. Add test for theme auto-sync when plugin installed. Verify theme applies immediately after install.
test_criteria: Theme auto-sync when plugin installed works
Theme applies immediately after install
tasks.impl_notes: Test that plugin install hook triggers theme reload.
